positive: A minimalist, highly detailed geometric pattern featuring stylized woodland creatures—a fox, a fox silhouette, a pair of hummingbirds, and forest mushrooms—intertwined with abstract geometric elements like mandalas and dotted lines. The composition is centered, designed as a seamless tile for apparel printing. The style should be a modern ethnic aesthetic, combining clean black line work with pops of muted pastel colors (sage green, dusty rose, slate blue). Strong contrast, flat vector illustration quality, high readability, and a clean, sophisticated aesthetic. Aspect Ratio: 1:1.
negative: blur, artifacts, low resolution, grain, text, watermark, signature, out of frame, poor quality, cropped, extra limbs, mutated, bad anatomy
